overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character in a futuristic exosuit traversing a vast grassy wilderness. The character walks through dense tall grass, crosses a shallow river, and continues across open terrain with snow-capped mountains visible through misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tall grass field with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense tall grass toward a distant river and mountain range

entered.detail: large mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible through atmospheric mist
dense tall green grass reaching knee to waist height
rocky formations and low hills on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy field with dense tall vegetation. The character walks forward through the swaying grass with a majestic snow-capped mountain range dominating the background under an overcast sky.

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into shallow river water
character exits the river onto the opposite grassy bank

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water creating splashes and ripples around the boots

entered.detail: shallow stream with clear water showing ripples and reflections

segments.scene_description: The character enters and crosses a shallow river, with water splashing around the legs. The snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background as the camera follows the wading movement through the stream.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered rocks approaching rocky terrain

events.description: passing a yellow glowing marker post on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through open terrain toward distant rocky formations and mountain valleys

entered.detail: tall glowing yellow signpost marking the traversal path
large rock formations and boulders scattered across the landscape
distant misty valley with low vegetation and winding paths

segments.scene_description: After crossing the river, the character traverses open grassland with shorter vegetation and scattered rocks. A yellow marker post is passed on the left, and the terrain gradually becomes more rocky as the character approaches distant formations with the mountain range still visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast wilderness that transitions from dense grasslands to a rocky plateau beneath a towering mountain range. It begins with the character pushing through a wide field of swaying tall vegetation under an overcast sky, with majestic snow-capped peaks dominating the horizon. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts into a shallow river where water splashes around their legs while the mountains remain a constant backdrop. The scene then opens into a stretch of shorter grassland and scattered rocks, passing a yellow marker post on the left. Finally, the landscape becomes increasingly rocky as the character advances toward distant formations with the mountain range still visible ahead.
